recommendations.title: The Best Man
recommendations.overview: Mercenaries seize control of a remote resort hotel during a wedding and it's up to the best man, the groom and their drunken best friend to stop the terrorists and save the hostages.

recommendations.title: 15 Minutes of War

recommendations.title: April 9th
recommendations.overview: In the early morning of April 9, 1940, the Danish army is alerted: the Germans have crossed the border.

recommendations.title: King of Thieves
recommendations.overview: London, England, April 2015. Brian Reader, a retired thief, gathers an unlikely gang of burglars to perpetrate the biggest and boldest heist in British history. The thieves assault the Hatton Garden Safe Deposit Company and escape with millions in go

recommendations.title: Raazi
recommendations.overview: An Indian spy is married to a Pakistani military officer during the Indo-Pakistani War of 1971.

recommendations.title: Flyboys
recommendations.genres: Action, Adventure, Drama, History, Romance, War
recommendations.overview: The adventures of the Lafayette Escadrille, young Americans who volunteered for the French military before the U.S. entered World War I, and became the country's first fighter pilots.

recommendations.title: De Gaulle
recommendations.overview: Paris, June 1940. The de Gaulle couple is confronted with the military and political collapse of France. Charles de Gaulle joins London while Yvonne, his wife, finds herself with her three children on the road of the exodus.

recommendations.title: Hotel Mumbai
